creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Why you removed NO_STAGE again from the makefile. Now the port does not
install - see the beginning of the PR.


So this is wrong: "NO_STAGE doesn't seem to make any difference in build failures reported
by users of this port."


It MAKES a difference.


NO_STAGE=yes was the solution.

Please put it back, now the port is not installable.

Heino
